description:
You are designing a tiny “disk-usage analysis” workflow for an internal automation system.  
The operations are intentionally simple (no more than 3-4 terminal commands) but the resulting artefact must follow an exact, machine-verifiable format.

Objective  
1. Inspect the **exact** size of the directory “/home/user/disk_demo”.  
2. Write one single-line report file that captures this size in a predictable format.  

Required artefact  
Create a new file named “/home/user/workflow_reports/disk_usage_report.log”.  
• The file must contain exactly one line (no trailing blank line).  
• That line must match this template **precisely** (note the colon, pipe, and uppercase):

SIZE_BYTES:<integer>|TARGET:/home/user/disk_demo

Where  
<integer> = the size in **bytes** returned by running  
      du -sb /home/user/disk_demo | cut -f1

Directory policy  
• If “/home/user/workflow_reports” does not yet exist, your workflow must create it.  
• The permissions of “disk_usage_report.log” must be 0644 (rw-r--r--).  

End state that will be automatically tested  
1. “/home/user/workflow_reports/disk_usage_report.log” exists.  
2. It is a regular file (not a directory or symlink) with mode 0644.  
3. The file contains exactly one line matching the template above, with the size in bytes **accurately** reflecting the current contents of “/home/user/disk_demo”.  

Hints (do NOT include explicit command examples)  
• Combine “du -sb” with standard text utilities to extract the number only.  
• Remember to redirect (not append) the generated text into the log file.  
• Use “chmod” to set the requested permissions.
truth:
Initial fixture (already present when the agent starts):

Directory: /home/user/disk_demo  
    ├── file1.txt      (5 120 bytes; plain ASCII text, filled with “A”)  
    └── file2.bin      (20 480 bytes; random data)

Precise byte size of /home/user/disk_demo at task start: 25 600

Expected final log file:
Path: /home/user/workflow_reports/disk_usage_report.log  
Permissions: 0644 (rw-r--r--)  
Content (single line, no newline at end of file):
SIZE_BYTES:25600|TARGET:/home/user/disk_demo
name: task_000000_a68f7aad
